# Ratebench

> Freelance rate intelligence. Real market data on what clients actually pay
> independent designers, developers, photographers, copywriters, and brand
> designers — by city, by skill, by experience tier. Built from BLS OEWS data,
> freelance job board scraping, and contributor-submitted real rates.
> Updated quarterly. The mission: help freelancers charge what they're worth, not less.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://ratebench.app): Interactive rate explorer with P25/P50/P75/P90 distributions for major freelance categories across US metro areas
- [Contribute](https://ratebench.app/contribute): Submit your real rate quarterly to get free Pro access while contributing
- [FAQ](https://ratebench.app/faq): Common questions about freelance pricing methodology

## Methodology

Ratebench blends three data sources with different biases:
- **BLS OEWS** (Bureau of Labor Statistics Occupational Employment Statistics): W-2 employee comp, public; serves as the floor.
- **Freelance job boards**: advertised/aspirational rates from public listings; high but biased upward.
- **Contributor submissions**: real rates that hit freelancer bank accounts; smallest N but highest fidelity.

Published percentiles require N≥5 per (skill × city × tier) cell. Submissions older than 12 months are deweighted. Outliers are winsorized at p5/p95. IPs are HMAC-hashed for abuse correlation, never stored raw.

## About

Founded 2026 by Sergio Ordonez. Single-member LLC structure under Cordillera Ventures LLC (Delaware). Currently in waitlist/beta phase.

## Search intents

- "What should I charge as a freelance [skill] in [city]?"
- "Freelance [skill] hourly rate [city] [year]"
- "Is $X/hr a good rate for a [skill] freelancer?"
- "Am I undercharging as a freelance [skill]?"
- "How to know if I'm leaving money on the table as a freelancer"

- Web: https://ratebench.app
- Email: hello@ratebench.app
